generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Deploys post-occupancy sensor data for iterative refinement of control policies using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS). Captures real-time occupancy patterns in building spaces."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental monitor capturing real-time temperature data from building zones. Integrated into BIM model for live operational data synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LuminositySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time luminosity levels across building spaces. Feeds data into TwinLight lighting control system for adaptive optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminosityDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks real-time energy consumption metrics for building systems (HVAC, lighting, etc.). Provides granular data for predictive analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LuminosityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminositySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically rich Building Information Model incorporating geometric, spatial, and functional data (IFC standards). Serves as the semantic backbone for DT deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoMiddleware, DittoFramework, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time data from sensors and Building Control Systems (BCS) ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto. Includes temperature, occupancy, luminosity, and energy consumption metrics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, LuminosityDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoFramework, UnrealEngine5
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded control logic within BIM for lighting systems (TwinLight) and reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS). Defines processing rules for physical-to-virtual interactions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization model rendered via Unreal Engine 5. Enables immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance DeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted metadata from BIM models (e.g., device IDs, tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) used to configure Eclipse Hono/Ditto runtime interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoMiddleware, DittoFramework
]

// C11: Enablers
instance HonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT middleware (Eclipse Hono) for real-time data ingestion from sensors and devices. Supports MQTT/AMQP protocols for low-latency communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance DittoFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin management framework enabling bidirectional communication, lifecycle management, and standardized Thing Model data structures."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides rich, interactive 3D visualization for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations. Enables real-time dashboards for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, WhatIfSimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates extraction of domain semantics from BIM and generation of runtime artifacts (e.g., Hono/Ditto configurations) via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService, ModularServiceIntegrationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework for adaptive control policies optimizing energy consumption, visual comfort, and health effects using post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables immersive 3D visualization of building operations via Unreal Engine 5. Allows facility managers to interact with the DT for monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationalInsight, FacilityManagerInteraction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Leverages reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) and control logic (TwinLight) to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and health effects while balancing operational constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, ComfortHealthRecommendation
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automates DT deployment by extracting device metadata from BIM models and generating runtime interfaces for Eclipse Hono/Ditto, reducing manual effort."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedDeploymentAction, RuntimeInterfaceGeneration
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates real-time bidirectional communication between physical building systems and virtual DT via Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocols."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationValidationAction, ControlPolicyUpdateAction
]

instance ModularServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides standardized extension points for DT Engineers to integrate custom services (e.g., analytics, simulation tools) via service-oriented architecture."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationAction, ScalabilityExtensionAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders interactive 3D dashboards showing live energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and system performance for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDashboardInsight, SystemPerformanceInsight
]

instance WhatIfSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supports planning and simulation of refurbishment impacts and long-term energy efficiency strategies through virtual testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentImpactInsight, EnergyEfficiencyStrategyInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables dynamic adjustment of control policies (e.g., RL hyperparameters in BOREALIS) based on performance feedback from physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyUpdateAction, AdaptiveOptimizationInsight
]

]

]

]

]

]

]

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **bidirectional communication** between the DT and the physical building, where the DT generates **control signals, optimization commands, or adaptive policies** that are executed by the Building Control Systems (BCS). The **TwinLight** project demonstrates this via **automated commissioning** and **user-centered control strategies** embedded in BIM models, which are translated into runtime commands for lighting systems. The **BOREALIS** project uses **reinforcement learning (RL)** to dynamically adjust lighting parameters based on real-time sensor feedback, feeding optimized control policies back to the physical system. These interactions are facilitated by **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, which relay commands via **standardized protocols** (e.g., MQTT, CoAP) to actuators and controllers in the physical building."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time** for core synchronization tasks (e.g., sensor data ingestion, control signal execution) and **adaptive** for higher-level services like **reinforcement learning-based optimization (BOREALIS)**. The **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware ensures **low-latency data exchange** (millisecond to second-scale) for operational monitoring and control. For **predictive analytics and RL-based adjustments**, the time scale may extend to **minutes or hours**, depending on the complexity of the optimization task. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **temporal fidelity** of the DT’s synchronization with the physical building."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** centered around the **BIM model** and **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**. The constellation includes:
  - **Core components**: BIM model (semantic backbone), Hono/Ditto (real-time data exchange), Unreal Engine 5 (visualization).
  - **Acting components**: Building Control Systems (BCS), actuators (e.g., lighting, HVAC), and **reinforcement learning controllers (BOREALIS)**.
  - **Sensing components**: IoT sensors (e.g., temperature, occupancy, luminosity) and **user interaction data**.
  - **Extension points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating **custom services** (e.g., analytics, simulation tools) developed by **DT Engineers**.
  - **Orchestration**: The **DT Framework** acts as a central hub, facilitating **bidirectional data exchange** between physical assets and their digital counterparts while supporting **runtime configuration management** for adaptability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life cycle stages** covered by the DT include:
  1. **Design phase**: Leverages **BIM models** to represent the building as-designed, including geometric, spatial, and functional attributes of components.
  2. **Construction phase**: Supports **clash detection, simulation, and documentation** via BIM, though real-time synchronization is limited until operational systems are deployed.
  3. **Operation phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** using **sensor data, BCS feedback, and reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)**. The DT evolves alongside the physical building, accommodating **refurbishments and adaptations** through runtime configuration management.
  4. **End-of-life phase**: Facilitates **decommissioning planning and data archiving** by maintaining historical records of the building’s digital representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which measures the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. The framework addresses **semantic drift** (divergence between digital and physical representations) through **real-time synchronization** and **automated validation** of BIM models. Quality assurance is embedded in the **model-driven deployment pipeline**, ensuring consistency and interoperability across the DT life cycle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the DT is established using **Eclipse Hono** (for IoT data ingestion) and **Ditto** (for digital twin management). Communication relies on **tenant and device IDs** or **endpoint addresses** extracted from BIM models. The framework supports **bidirectional, real-time data exchange** between sensors/actuators and the DT, enabling seamless synchronization. No specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) or formats (e.g., JSON, IFC) are explicitly detailed beyond the use of Hono/Ditto."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT engineering follows **AECO-specific standards such as BIM** and leverages **standardized integration mechanisms** for interoperability. The framework emphasizes **semantic standardization** through BIM’s object-based modeling and **modular service integration** via extension points. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, MQTT) are not explicitly mentioned, the approach aligns with **open-source DT frameworks** (e.g., Eclipse Hono, Ditto) and **model-driven engineering principles** for consistency."
]
